Skill Path: Resilience

Your body is especially resilient against hardships.

While developing your skills in Survival you chose to focus specifically on Resilience, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.N8Xz5fuW6o7GW124]{Fast Recovery}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.TZDQM59QbGDLheEM]{Stifle Flames}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.49y9Ec4bDii8pcD3]{Subsist}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.N8Xz5fuW6o7GW124]{Fast Recovery}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.TZDQM59QbGDLheEM]{Stifle Flames}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.yTLGclKtWVFZLKIz]{Robust Health}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.2KVllUXqgWq7jCmX]{Sanguine Tenacity}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Vk7BzAb3D9r226sI]{Legendary Guide}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Ta61ObC8Lk7BxTFO]{Legendary Survivalist}
